response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit executive-level leadership in high-growth fintech or regulated environments. His technical breadth and open-source contributions suggest potential, though his background is more hands-on than strategic.
strengths: Diverse technical expertise across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with hands-on experience in event-driven architectures and distributed systems.
Contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators) and open-source projects like GISCollective, showing familiarity with agentic workflows.
Strong focus on testability, observability, and developer tooling, aligning with the role's emphasis on reliability and evaluation rigor.
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., scaling teams from 10 to 30+ or owning architectural governance at a scale-up).
Limited evidence of fintech-specific expertise (e.g., credit systems, real-time risk modeling, or regulatory compliance).
Most AI-agent work appears to be in prototype or tooling contexts rather than production systems with financial stakes.
